data.content: Implementation review approved. The lightbox Take! path now preserves repo scope by attaching normalized _repoPath before invoking the session start handler, which addresses the reported knots/beads backend misrouting when detailRepo is the only repo context. Reviewed the implementation diff in src/components/beat-detail-lightbox.tsx and regression coverage in src/lib/__tests__/beat-detail-lightbox.test.ts. Sanity validation passed in an isolated checkout of commit 0f00b7979b2c: bun install --frozen-lockfile, bun run lint (warnings only, exit 0), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
